title: Slider
description: Single-value numeric slider with marks, value formatting, label and all the usual visual variants.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Slider with visible value and label.
basic.label: Volume

marks.title: With marks
marks.desc: Enable marks to show reference points along the track.
marks.label: Quality

step.title: Custom step
step.desc: Control the granularity of the slider with the step prop.
step.label: Step of 5

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.desc: Disabled state preserving the visible value.
disabled.label: Disabled

props.showValue: Displays the numeric value next to the label.
props.formatValue: Function to format the displayed value.
props.marks: Discrete marks. true = one per step.
props.label: Visible label above the control.
props.color: Semantic color of the fill and thumb.
props.readonly: Locks changes while keeping the value visible.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted when the value changes (syncs v-model).
emits.change: Emitted when a drag or keyboard interaction ends.

types.title: Slider
types.desc: TypeScript interface for the Slider component props. Supports marks, custom formatting, vertical orientation, and value tooltips.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.kbArrow: Increment or decrement the value by one step
a11y.ariaValueNow: The current numeric value is announced to screen readers
a11y.ariaInvalid: Set to true when errorText is present
a11y.ariaDescribedBy: Links helper or error text to the slider for screen reader context
a11y.ariaDisabled: Communicates disabled state to assistive technologies
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name when no visible label is present
a11y.focusThumb: The thumb is focusable and keyboard-operable; arrow keys change the value
